channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Opening Day 2025: Cubs have a winning Opening Day record, featuring some memorable moments
item.description: CHICAGO — Opening Day is finally upon us. It's a day that comes with a sense of hope among baseball fans in early spring, a season that represents new beginnings often exemplified by the warmer temperatures and the blooming of trees and flowers.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Lakers’ LeBron James addresses confrontation with ESPN’s Stephen A. Smith
item.description: During an extended interview on the “The Pat McAfee Show,” James says the polarizing Smith “completely missed the whole point” of why he approached him during a game earlier this month.
item.dc:creator: Khobi Price, The Mercury News

item.title: LeBron James has big finish to lift Lakers past Pacers and extend record scoring streak
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — LeBron James started the fourth quarter Wednesday in danger of failing to extend his NBA record for consecutive double-digit scoring games. He finished it with yet another crowning achievement.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LeBron James beats buzzer with tip to lift Lakers past Pacers and keep record streak alive
item.description: LeBron James had a buzzer-beating tip-in to cap a 10-point fourth quarter, Luka Doncic scored 34 points and the Los Angeles Lakers beat the Indiana Pacers 120-119 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Michael Marot, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Mavericks star Kyrie Irving has surgery for torn ACL in his left knee
item.description: Dallas Mavericks star Kyrie Irving had surgery on the torn ACL in his left knee, starting a process of recovery that’s likely to continue into next season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mississippi State's Chandler Prater faces online criticism following JuJu Watkins injury
item.description: Mississippi State's Chandler Prater has disabled the comment section on her social media amid growing backlash that followed JuJu Watkins injury in the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rail service to and from Petco Park expands for Padres season
item.description: The North County Transit District is expanding COASTER service to provide fans with a safe and convenient way to get to and from Petco Park on Padres game days.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Softball: Poway 2, Patrick Henry 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- A gorgeous day to play softball on Monday afternoon with Patrick Henry hosting Poway. The Titans won a fantastic game 2-0 in 10 innings. Great pitching on both sides with Mya McGowan leading the way for Poway with a complete game shutout and adding 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Ex-NFL player charged after 190 dogs seized from Oklahoma dog fighting venture
item.description: An Oklahoma man is facing federal charges after officials seized 190 dogs from an animal fighting venture, according to court documents.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, WGN 9

item.title: New Falcons edge rusher Leonard Floyd says 'the more the merrier' if more help comes in NFL draft
item.description: Floyd said Tuesday he looks at pass rush as a team effort and added he would welcome more help coming in the NFL draft.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NCAA faces calls to follow World Athletics, enact cheek-swab tests to compete in women's sports
item.description: The NCAA faced calls to follow in the footsteps of World Athletics and enact gender tests for athletes who want to compete in the female category.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A handful of March Madness coaches stand out for their fashion choices amid a sea of casual attire
item.description: Notre Dame's Niele Ivey is doing it the way she learned how to coach, pacing the sideline in stylish attire in a time when most coaches favor far more casual attire. “When I first got into coaching, I learned under a Hall of Fame coach," Ivey said.
item.dc:creator: KRISTIE RIEKEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Investigation focus in death of ex-Yankees star's son shifts to possible food poisoning
item.description: Costa Rican investigators have shifted their focus in their investigation into the death of Miller Gardner to possible food poisoning. Miller was 14.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Arkansas' Calipari not backing off relying on freshmen in NIL, transfer portal era
item.description: (AP) - John Calipari embraced the one-and-done era like few college basketball coaches, becoming one of the best annually at bringing in talented freshmen and routinely getting them to Final Fours before shipping them off to the NBA.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ducks' Trevor Zegras jokes unique national anthem rendition contributed to slow start
item.description: Anaheim Ducks star Trevor Zegas joked last week that the unique rendition of the national anthem contributed to the team's slow start against the Nashville Predators.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Argentina secures a World Cup spot and then celebrates it with a 4-1 victory over archrival Brazil
item.description: BUENOS AIRES, Argentina (AP) — Defending champion Argentina celebrated throughout Tuesday as the team secured its place at the 2026 World Cup hours before an historic 4-1 win over archrival Brazil.
item.dc:creator: DEBORA REY and MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Testing begins at Cortina's controversial Olympic sliding track for bobsled, luge and skeleton
item.description: ROME (AP) — When Italian skeleton competitor Mattia Gaspari became the first athlete to test the controversial sliding track for next year's Milan-Cortina Winter Olympics, he did so in a sort of tunnel under a temporary roof built of wooden beams and white plastic paper.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Xavier hires Richard Pitino as basketball coach
item.description: There will be more than one Pitino in the Big East next season. Xavier hired Richard Pitino, the son of St. John's coach Rick Pitino, as its basketball coach on Tuesday night. The school had an opening after Sean Miller left to accept the Texas job on Monday.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego State Aztec guard declares for NBA Draft
item.description: San Diego State Aztecs men's basketball player Miles Byrd is looking to make his next move to the professional level.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Russell Wilson is heading to the New York Giants, AP source says
item.description: Russell Wilson has agreed on a one-year contract with the New York Giants, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Stanford football coach Troy Taylor fired after allegations
item.description: (KRON) -- Stanford football head coach Troy Taylor has been fired, team officials announced Tuesday, following a report that he was investigated twice for allegedly mistreating staffers.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: USC star JuJu Watkins suffers season-ending knee injury in March Madness win over Mississippi State
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins was carried off the floor with a season-ending knee injury in the first quarter of top-seeded Southern California’s game against Mississippi State in the NCAA Tournament on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah's playoff hopes take big hit with 5-1 loss
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The playoff hopes of the Utah Hockey Club are growing dimmer after a 5-1 loss to the Detroit Red Wings Monday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Colorado State's Niko Medved leaves for Minnesota after 7-year run with Rams
item.description: Niko Medved, the second-winningest coach in Rams' history, has accepted the head coaching job with the Big Ten's Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Sacramento State to hire Mike Bibby as basketball coach, AP source says
item.description: Former Sacramento Kings star Mike Bibby will be hired as the basketball coach at Sacramento State, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sam Merrill has found a home in Cleveland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a homecoming for former Bountiful High and Utah State star Sam Merrill Sunday night. Merrill hit a couple of three-pointers in his return to his home state in Cleveland's 120-91 win over the Jazz. Merrill says loves playing in front of family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ryan Donato, Connor Bedard lead Blackhawks over Flyers 7-4
item.description: Ryan Donato scored twice, Connor Bedard had a goal and an assist, and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Philadelphia Flyers 7-4 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Koby Brea leads the way as Kentucky beats Illinois 84-75 for first Sweet 16 appearance since 2019
item.description: Koby Brea matched a career high with 23 points and Kentucky beat Illinois 84-75 on Sunday to advance beyond the NCAA Tournament’s opening weekend for the first time since they reached the Elite Eight in 2019.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Major League Baseball removes references to 'diversity' from MLB Careers home page
item.description: Baseball Commissioner Rob Manfred, who launched a Diversity Pipeline Program in 2016, said following an owners meeting in Palm Beach, Florida, last month that MLB was evaluating the interpretation of law coming from the federal government.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Top-ranked Chicago area softball player to represent Puerto Rico at U-15 Pan American Championship
item.description: ROSELLE, Ill. — In the backyard of her Roselle home, Maya Melendez practices her favorite sport on her personal field of dreams. “When you’re a kid playing (sports), it’s basketball in the street, so what kid wouldn’t want to have their own field in their yard?” Maya’s dad, Randy Smith, figured.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: NCAA Tournament by the numbers: Facts and figures that define the men's and women's tournaments
item.description: The first Thursday of the NCAA Tournament is the most sacred day of the year for college basketball fans. It's like Christmas morning. That day is here, when the brackets are filled with a perfectly symmetrical 64 teams and March Madness truly reaches its most frenetic, magical peak.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
